biological_replicate: Tryptic digests of HeLa cell lysates were analyzed.
technical_replicate: The target samples for LC-MS experiments were measured three times...
experimental_design: frequency multiple vs dipole detector comparison
To demonstrate the advantage of a frequency multiple detector in online LC FT-ICR MS used for proteome research...
factor_value: the peptides identified with the frequency multiple detector were compared to those with a dipole detector.
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
